zh.description: 生成创意、评估方案，并为最佳方案制定行动计划

workflows.name: Bug Triage & Fix Plan
workflows.description: Analyse a bug report, reproduce the failure path, identify root cause, and produce a prioritised fix plan with test cases.

zh.description: 分析 Bug 报告，还原失败路径，定位根因，输出优先级排序的修复计划与测试用例。

workflows.name: Code Review
workflows.description: Parallel code analysis pipeline that evaluates correctness, security, and style independently, then synthesises findings into a unified review summary.

zh.description: 并行代码分析流水线，独立评估正确性、安全性和代码风格，然后将发现汇总为统一的审查报告。

workflows.name: Competitor Analysis
workflows.description: Research competitors, map their strengths and weaknesses, and produce a strategic positioning report.

zh.description: 调研竞争对手，梳理其优劣势，输出战略定位报告。

workflows.name: Content Creation Pipeline
workflows.description: Research a topic, build a structured outline, write a full article, then edit for clarity, flow, and factual consistency.

zh.description: 调研主题，构建结构化提纲，撰写完整文章，再编辑润色以提升清晰度、流畅性和事实准确性。

workflows.name: Content Review
workflows.description: Multi-agent content review pipeline that drafts, reviews for quality and accuracy, then produces a final edited version incorporating feedback.

zh.description: 多智能体内容审校流水线，先起草内容，再分别审查质量和准确性，最后综合反馈生成终稿。

workflows.name: Customer Support Triage
workflows.description: Tiered customer support pipeline that classifies incoming requests by urgency and category, drafts an appropriate response, and escalates complex issues to a specialist.

zh.description: 分级客户支持流水线，按紧急程度和类别对请求进行分类，起草相应回复，并将复杂问题升级给专家处理。

workflows.name: Data Analysis & Transform
workflows.description: Clean, transform, analyse, and summarise raw data. Handles messy inputs: CSV, JSON, tables, or free-form text.

zh.description: 清洗、转换、分析并摘要原始数据，支持 CSV、JSON、表格或自由文本等杂乱输入。

workflows.name: Decision Matrix
workflows.description: Evaluate competing options against weighted criteria to produce a clear, defensible recommendation.

zh.description: 对竞争方案按加权标准进行评估，输出清晰、有据可查的推荐结论。

workflows.name: Incident Postmortem
workflows.description: Turn raw incident notes into a structured postmortem: timeline, root cause, impact assessment, and action items.

zh.description: 将原始故障记录整理为结构化复盘报告：时间线、根因分析、影响评估和行动项。

workflows.name: Job Application Package
workflows.description: Tailor a resume and cover letter to a specific job posting, then prepare targeted interview talking points.

zh.description: 针对特定职位定制简历和求职信，并准备有针对性的面试谈话要点。

workflows.name: Personalised Learning Plan
workflows.description: Assess current knowledge, identify gaps, and build a structured learning roadmap with resources and milestones.

zh.description: 评估当前知识水平，识别差距，构建带资源和里程碑的结构化学习路线图。

workflows.name: Market Research Report
workflows.description: Analyse a market opportunity: size, trends, customer segments, key players, and go-to-market entry points.

zh.description: 分析市场机会：市场规模、趋势、客户细分、主要参与者和进入市场的切入点。

workflows.name: Meeting Summary & Action Items
workflows.description: Transform raw meeting notes or transcript into a structured summary, decisions log, and follow-up email.

zh.description: 将原始会议记录或转录文本整理为结构化摘要、决策日志和跟进邮件。

workflows.name: Product Spec Writer
workflows.description: Turn a product idea or feature request into a complete PRD: user stories, acceptance criteria, technical notes, and open questions.

zh.description: 将产品想法或功能需求转化为完整 PRD：用户故事、验收标准、技术备注和待确认事项。

workflows.name: Refactor Plan
workflows.description: Analyse code for quality issues, prioritise refactoring opportunities, and produce a safe incremental migration plan.

zh.description: 分析代码质量问题，优先排序重构机会，制定安全的增量迁移计划。

workflows.name: Research & Summarise
workflows.description: Research pipeline that investigates a topic from multiple angles, cross-checks findings for accuracy, and produces a concise executive summary with citations.

zh.description: 调研流水线，从多个角度研究主题，交叉验证结果的准确性，并生成带引用的精炼摘要。

workflows.name: Test Suite Generation
workflows.description: Analyse code to generate comprehensive unit tests, integration tests, and edge case coverage.

zh.description: 分析代码，生成完整的单元测试、集成测试和边界情况覆盖。

workflows.name: Translation & Polish
workflows.description: Translate text into a target language, then review for accuracy, naturalness, and cultural fit.

zh.description: 将文本翻译为目标语言，再审校准确性、自然度和文化适配性。

workflows.name: Weekly Report Generator
workflows.description: Turn raw work notes into a polished weekly report with highlights, metrics, blockers, and next week's priorities.

zh.description: 将零散工作笔记整理为规范周报，包含亮点、指标、阻塞项和下周计划。

agents.name: researcher

agents.name: sales-assistant

agents.name: social-media

agents.name: test-engineer
agents.description: Quality assurance engineer. Designs test strategies, writes tests, validates correctness.

agents.name: translator
agents.description: Multi-language translation agent for document translation, localization, and cross-cultural communication.

agents.name: travel-planner
agents.description: Trip planning agent for itinerary creation, booking research, budget estimation, and travel logistics.

agents.name: tutor

agents.name: writer
agents.description: Content writer. Creates documentation, articles, and technical writing.

plugins.name: auto-summarizer
plugins.description: Maintains a running conversation summary to help agents handle long conversations without losing context

plugins.name: context-decay
plugins.description: Time-based memory decay with relevance scoring for natural context forgetting

plugins.description: Logs all conversations to JSONL files for auditing, analytics, and debugging

plugins.name: episodic-memory
plugins.description: Episode-based memory segmentation and recall for cross-conversation context continuity

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Safety filter that detects potentially harmful content patterns and injects warnings into agent context

plugins.name: keyword-memory
plugins.description: Extracts keywords and named entities from user messages and returns them as contextual memories

plugins.name: mempalace-indexer
plugins.description: Auto-index conversations into MemPalace and recall relevant memories. No API keys, no cloud.

plugins.name: sentiment-tracker
plugins.description: Analyzes user message sentiment and injects emotional context so agents can respond with appropriate tone

plugins.name: todo-tracker
plugins.description: Detects action items and tasks mentioned in conversations, persists them, and recalls them as context

plugins.name: topic-memory
plugins.description: Topic-aware memory recall with keyword clustering for cross-conversation context

plugins.name: user-profile
plugins.description: Persistent user profiling from conversation patterns for personalized agent responses
